The oxygen atom (O:11, shown in red) is connected to one carbon atom (C:10, shown in gold/yellow). This appears to be a carbonyl or similar functional group where the oxygen is bonded to the carbon.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 11 (element: O). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
